tasks.task_goal: Sweep cereal crumbs from a kitchen tile floor into a dustpan after breakfast
tasks.expected_outcome: Crumbs are consolidated into a small pile and transferred cleanly into the dustpan, leaving the floor clear
required_tool_attributes: wide bristle head for broad surface contact
moderately stiff bristles to push particles via friction
angled head to maintain consistent edge contact with the floor
long handle to apply distributed force comfortably
unconventional_tools: long-handled car snow brush with bristle head
telescoping window squeegee
stiff piece of corrugated cardboard used as a floor scraper
opposite_tool_attributes: narrow, minimal-contact head that cannot cover a broad floor area
very soft, floppy fibers that buckle and glide instead of pushing via friction
non-angled, rounded head that cannot maintain a straight edge against the floor

tasks.task_goal: Clear sawdust off a woodworking bench into a waste bin
tasks.expected_outcome: Loose sawdust is gathered along the bench edge and swept into a bin, leaving a clean work surface
required_tool_attributes: dense, short bristles for fine particulate control
rigid brush spine to distribute force evenly
hand-sized handle for precise strokes
slightly compliant bristle tips to conform to minor surface irregularities
unconventional_tools: nail brush
plastic dough scraper
small window squeegee
opposite_tool_attributes: sparse, long, floppy bristles that scatter fine dust
flexible or limp spine/backing that cannot distribute force evenly
overly stiff, non-compliant bristle tips that won’t conform to minor surface irregularities

tasks.task_goal: Gather wet leaves on a front porch into a pile for bagging
tasks.expected_outcome: Leaves are moved into a manageable pile without clogging, ready for pickup
required_tool_attributes: extra-wide head for high-coverage sweeping
stiff, water-resistant bristles to move clumped leaves
rigid block to transfer distributed force across the head
long handle for leverage over rough outdoor surfaces
unconventional_tools: wide snow pusher shovel
storefront window squeegee with extension pole
rubber boot-scraper doormat strapped to a long handle as a pusher
opposite_tool_attributes: narrow, small head with minimal contact area
soft, water-absorbent fibers that collapse when wet
flexible or floppy head that cannot transmit force across its width

tasks.task_goal: Push standing water across a garage floor toward a floor drain
tasks.expected_outcome: Water is driven in a consistent sheet toward the drain, leaving the floor largely dry
required_tool_attributes: continuous flexible rubber blade for edge-to-surface seal
rigid channel to maintain uniform pressure along the blade
wide head for efficient coverage
long handle to apply even, distributed force
unconventional_tools: rubber-edged snow pusher shovel
long-handled dustpan with rubber lip
sponge mop (roller mop)
opposite_tool_attributes: bristled or porous contact edge that cannot form a continuous seal with the floor
floppy, flexible head without a rigid channel, causing uneven pressure along the edge
narrow head with a short or no handle, limiting coverage and preventing even, distributed force

tasks.task_goal: Collect scattered nails and metal shavings on a shop floor into a disposal container
tasks.expected_outcome: Ferrous debris is gathered under the magnetic bar in a single path and released into a container, reducing puncture hazards
required_tool_attributes: broad magnetic bar for wide-area pickup
wheels to maintain consistent height and motion
rigid frame to transmit pushing force evenly
handle for controlled sweeping over the surface
unconventional_tools: Hand truck/dolly with a magnetic knife strip fixed along the toe plate
Kick scooter with a magnetic knife strip mounted across the front axle
Rolling suitcase with strong magnets attached along the bottom front edge
opposite_tool_attributes: non-magnetic, narrow point-contact edge instead of a broad magnetic bar
no wheels with a floppy, uneven contact surface that changes height
flexible, collapsible frame with no functional handle for controlled sweeping

tasks.task_goal: Remove fresh snow from a car windshield toward the hood before driving
tasks.expected_outcome: Windshield and wipers are cleared of loose snow, improving visibility
required_tool_attributes: wide foam head or soft bristles for broad contact without scratching
cold-resistant materials to remain flexible in low temperatures
long handle for reach across the windshield
slight head compliance to follow glass curvature
unconventional_tools: sponge mop (foam head) with long handle
window squeegee with telescoping handle
foam paint roller on an extension pole
opposite_tool_attributes: narrow, hard, abrasive edge that scratches glass instead of a wide soft contact surface
materials that become stiff or brittle in cold temperatures, losing flexibility or cracking
short, non-extendable handle with a rigid, non-compliant head that can’t reach or follow windshield curvature

tasks.task_goal: Level surface and move topdressing on a clay tennis court toward the sidelines
tasks.expected_outcome: Court surface is evened out with loose material redistributed to edges, improving play consistency
required_tool_attributes: wide, flexible mesh to create distributed dragging force
weighted edge to maintain contact with the clay
pull bar or rope for even towing across the surface
abrasion-resistant material to withstand grit
unconventional_tools: section of plastic snow/safety fence mesh with a metal or PVC pipe as a weighted leading edge and a tow rope
cut piece of chain-link fencing with a 2x4 attached as a weighted edge and a pull rope
mesh truck tarp or shade cloth with a broom handle as a weighted edge and a rope for towing
opposite_tool_attributes: narrow, rigid panel or point-contact head that concentrates force instead of a wide, flexible mesh
unweighted or buoyant leading edge that lifts and loses contact with the clay
fragile, tear-prone material that abrades quickly on grit

tasks.task_goal: Brush algae and silt from a swimming pool floor toward the main drain
tasks.expected_outcome: Suspended debris is directed toward circulation points, aiding filtration and water clarity
required_tool_attributes: wide brush head with angled bristles for effective push on a submerged surface
water-resistant construction for durability
telescoping pole for reach and leverage
medium-stiff bristles to dislodge biofilm without damaging liner
unconventional_tools: deck scrub brush head (polypropylene bristles) threaded onto a painter’s telescoping pole
extendable car-wash brush (soft/medium nylon bristles) on a wash pole
wide floor squeegee with neoprene blade on a telescoping handle
opposite_tool_attributes: narrow head with soft, non-angled bristles that collapse underwater
absorbent, non-water-resistant construction that swells or disintegrates in water
fixed, very short handle with no telescoping reach or leverage

tasks.task_goal: Sweep loose hair from a client’s neck down to the cape edge after a haircut
tasks.expected_outcome: Neck and collar area are cleared of itchy clippings without irritating the skin
required_tool_attributes: ultra-soft, dense bristles for gentle broad contact
flared brush profile to move many fine strands at once
compact handle for controlled strokes
anti-static fibers to reduce hair cling
unconventional_tools: kabuki makeup brush (large, dense powder brush)
baby hair brush (soft natural-bristle)
horsehair clothes brush (garment brush)
opposite_tool_attributes: stiff, sparse, abrasive bristles that irritate skin instead of giving gentle, broad contact
narrow, non-flared brush head that makes only small point contact and misses fine strands
static-generating or tacky fibers that make hair cling to the tool and skin

tasks.task_goal: Clear excess flour from a bakery prep table into a scrap bin
tasks.expected_outcome: Work surface is free of loose flour, ready for the next dough batch
required_tool_attributes: soft natural bristles to avoid scratching smooth benches
narrow, straight edge for controlled sweeping lines
rigid spine for uniform pressure distribution
food-safe, flour-resistant materials
unconventional_tools: new, unused natural-bristle flat paintbrush (2-3 inch)
new horsehair clothes/shoe brush
small silicone window squeegee
opposite_tool_attributes: Abrasive, stiff metal or synthetic bristles that can scratch smooth prep benches
Wide, curved or irregular sweeping edge that prevents controlled, straight-line passes
Flimsy, flexible spine that bows and cannot apply uniform pressure

tasks.task_goal: Sweep crumbs and dust out from a desktop keyboard toward a collection tray
tasks.expected_outcome: Debris is moved out of key gaps without building static, allowing easy disposal
required_tool_attributes: fine, conductive bristles to dissipate static
narrow, tapered brush head for tight spaces
rigid back to apply controlled, even force
ergonomic handle for precise maneuvering
unconventional_tools: interdental brush (proxy brush with wire core)
straw-cleaning brush for reusable straws
pipe cleaner (chenille stem)
opposite_tool_attributes: non-conductive, static-building coarse bristles
wide, blunt brush head with no taper for tight spaces
floppy, flexible back with a slippery, non-ergonomic handle

tasks.task_goal: Move pine needles off a shingled roof toward the gutter for collection
tasks.original_tool: soft-bristle push broom on extension pole
tasks.expected_outcome: Roof surface is cleared with debris aligned at the gutter line for easier bagging
required_tool_attributes: soft, flagged bristles to avoid damaging shingles
wide head for efficient coverage
lightweight, long extension pole for reach and control
rigid block to maintain even contact along the sweep
unconventional_tools: Pool noodle zip-tied to a painter's extension pole
18-inch paint roller frame with microfiber or foam cover on an extension pole
Microfiber flat floor mop (Swiffer-style) with telescoping handle
opposite_tool_attributes: abrasive, stiff wire bristles or sharp scraping edge that can damage shingles
narrow, small head that offers minimal coverage
short, heavy handle with no extension and a floppy/non-rigid head

tasks.task_goal: Sweep cold ash from a fireplace hearth toward the ash pan
tasks.expected_outcome: Residual ash is gathered into the pan, leaving the hearth tidy for the next fire
required_tool_attributes: heat-tolerant bristles suitable for ash
short, stiff bristles to move fine, heavy particles
rigid ferrule and spine for even pressure
compact handle for confined spaces
unconventional_tools: natural-fiber vegetable scrub brush (tampico/coir bristles on a wooden block)
stiff horsehair shoe-polishing brush
metal bench/dough scraper
opposite_tool_attributes: heat-sensitive bristles that soften, melt, or clump in residual heat
long, soft, highly flexible bristles that flick and disperse fine ash
loose, flexible ferrule/spine and an overlong, bulky handle that prevent even pressure in tight spaces

tasks.task_goal: Clean accumulated chalk dust from a whiteboard tray into a waste bin
tasks.expected_outcome: Chalk particles are consolidated and removed, preventing dust spread
required_tool_attributes: narrow head for tray-sized strokes
stiff-but-flexible bristles for powdery debris
rigid spine for uniform sweeping pressure
slightly angled head for edge contact
unconventional_tools: old toothbrush (angled-neck)
expired gift card/credit card
small rubber shower squeegee
opposite_tool_attributes: overly wide, bulky head that cannot fit within the tray
ultra-soft, floppy bristles that collapse under light pressure
limp, flexible spine that bends instead of applying uniform pressure

tasks.task_goal: Remove settled dust from solar panels toward the lower edge for rinsing
tasks.expected_outcome: Panels are free of dust films, improving light transmission and efficiency
required_tool_attributes: ultra-soft, non-scratching bristles for delicate glass
wide head to maximize contact area
water-fed channel to lubricate and carry debris along the sweep
long, lightweight pole for reach and controlled force
unconventional_tools: microfiber spray floor mop (Bona/Swiffer-style) with refillable reservoir
microfiber paint roller on an extension pole paired with a hand-pump garden sprayer for water feed
pool skimmer pole with a foam pool noodle wrapped in microfiber and a zip-tied soaker hose for gentle water-fed sweeping
opposite_tool_attributes: abrasive, stiff or metal bristles that can scratch glass
narrow, point-contact head that minimizes contact area
dry-only head with no water delivery (blocks or absorbs flow instead of feeding)

tasks.task_goal: Gather confetti and glitter off a theater stage into the wings after a show
tasks.expected_outcome: Floor is cleared with debris lined along the wings for bagging or vacuuming
required_tool_attributes: extra-wide head for fast coverage of large areas
medium-stiff bristles to move mixed-size debris
long handle for ergonomic, even-pressure strokes
durable block to maintain flat contact
unconventional_tools: plastic snow pusher shovel (wide-blade driveway shovel)
leaf rake used upside-down to push debris
rubber doormat zip-tied to a pole as a wide floor pusher
opposite_tool_attributes: narrow, small head that covers little area
ultra-soft or feather-like fibers instead of medium-stiff bristles
warping, non-rigid block that can’t maintain flat contact

tasks.task_goal: Consolidate gravel and grit on a warehouse floor toward a collection point
tasks.expected_outcome: A windrow of debris is formed for easy shoveling or vacuuming, reducing slip hazards
required_tool_attributes: very stiff bristles to push heavy particles
steel-reinforced block for rigidity under load
wide head for distributed force transfer
long handle for leverage over rough concrete
unconventional_tools: metal garden rake used as a push broom (tines forward or using the flat back)
wooden pallet dragged edge-on like a floor plow with a rope or handle
heavy coir doormat used as a drag broom to push grit toward a pile
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, floppy bristles or absorbent fibers that collapse under load
flexible, non-reinforced head/block that bends or breaks under pressure
short, flimsy handle with a narrow head that reduces leverage and coverage

tasks.task_goal: Brush spilled potting soil off a greenhouse potting bench into a trug
tasks.expected_outcome: Loose soil is gathered neatly for reuse or disposal, leaving the bench tidy
required_tool_attributes: medium-stiff bristles to move damp soil
rigid brush spine to distribute sweeping force
short handle for close control near edges
moisture-resistant fibers
unconventional_tools: stiff nylon nail brush
window squeegee
plastic paddle hairbrush
opposite_tool_attributes: ultra-soft, absorbent fibers that collapse when damp
flexible or hinged spine that bends under sweeping force
long, unwieldy handle that prevents close, edge control

tasks.task_goal: Clear litter and grit along a curb toward the vacuum intake of a municipal sweeper
tasks.expected_outcome: Debris is swept from the gutter line into the pickup path, leaving the curb clean
required_tool_attributes: rotating disc with radial, stiff bristles for continuous sweeping contact
hydraulic drive to sustain distributed sweeping force
durable bristles to withstand asphalt and curb edges
integrated water spray for dust suppression and debris cohesion
unconventional_tools: Garden-hose-powered rotary car-wash brush
Cordless drill with a stiff nylon bristle wheel/brush attachment
Angle grinder fitted with a knotted wire cup brush and a clip-on hose mister
opposite_tool_attributes: stationary, non-rotating surface without radial bristles
unpowered or low-torque drive instead of a hydraulic system
soft, easily frayed bristles and no water spray (dry, dust-dispersing operation)

tasks.task_goal: Expose buried boundary lines on a beach volleyball court by moving sand off the tape
tasks.expected_outcome: Court lines are clearly visible with sand brushed to either side of the tape
required_tool_attributes: cylindrical brush sized to line width for precise sweeping
stiff radial bristles to push dry sand effectively
wheeled guide to maintain alignment over the tape
ergonomic handle to apply steady, distributed force
unconventional_tools: large round barrel hairbrush
2-inch paint roller (frame with short-nap cover)
growler-size bottle brush with stiff bristles
opposite_tool_attributes: flat, non-cylindrical head not matched to the line width
soft, limp fibers or smooth surface instead of stiff radial bristles
no guide mechanism and a short, flexible handle that can’t maintain alignment or apply steady force
